citation_and_locator: Tse, Keith. 2019. Chinese Cleft Constructions: Microparametric ‘Lateral’ Grammaticalization. Buckeye East Asian Linguistics 4; presented at BEAL-3 in 2018, author-uploaded proceedings preprint
what_it_supports: Cantonese `係 … 嘅` as copula plus `ge3`-headed clausal complement; sentence-final `ge3`; subject, temporal-adjunct, and broad focus; TAM and negation examples; formal focus/presupposition analysis.
limit: Comparative formal paper relies substantially on inherited examples and supplies no new speaker sample, corpus counts, prosodic study, or Cantonese omission analysis.

citation_and_locator: Law, Yan Kei Ann. 2004. Sentence-final focus particles in Cantonese. PhD dissertation, University College London; chapter 4, especially pp. 153–157; UCL Discovery eprint 10101610
